title: Cobblemon Adventure GUI
description:
Made exclusively for Cobblemon Adventure - Pokemon modpack [Cobblemon] . 

This resource pack is to be used only with Cobblemon Adventure - Modpack to properly function as intended.
body:
This resourcepack is a modification and combination of [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface) and [Cobblemon Interface: Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) packs that adds custom: _buttons, containers, and item textures._

The pack makes the best user experience possible while playing **Cobblemon Adventure - Pokemon modpack [Cobblemon]**.

![main_menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c44ae1bc5fab234c77c43b3de8204a1bffad71c5.png)

All credits to:

[VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck) (Cobblemon Interface - Creator)

Garcesitos (Me as the Modder)
